**Checklist**
- [ ] No personal data (real names, real config, conversation/memory dumps) added
- [ ] `config/children.json`, `memory/`, `conversations/`, `logs/` stay git-ignored
- [ ] Safety-relevant logic stays in code (not only in prompts)
- [ ] Tested locally (`pytest` if touching safety gate / invention engine)
